get.description: Lists server sandbox configurations owned by the verified tenant and active organization. Physical provider roots are admin-only data.

post.description: Creates a sandbox volume owned by the verified tenant and active organization. Omitted initialUserGrant creates an explicit full grant for the current verified user; defaultAccess never implies tenant-wide access.

patch.description: Updates mutable volume configuration and transitions lifecycle status between active, read_only, and disabled using optimistic version validation.

delete.description: Deletes the organization-owned sandbox configuration and its grants and operation records. The provider directory and its files are not deleted.

post.description: Creates a user or organization grant. Workspace and role targets are rejected until an authoritative membership resolver is available.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SandboxProviderKind.description: Runtime-backed server sandbox provider. Only local_filesystem is available in this release.

SandboxGrantSubjectType.description: Supported explicit grant subjects. Workspace and role grants remain unavailable until an authoritative membership resolver exists.

enabled.description: When true, creates an explicit grant for the current verified user.

providerRootRef.description: Admin-only provider root. local_filesystem values must already exist, must be directories, and are canonicalized by the server before persistence.

defaultAccess.description: Volume configuration default only. It never grants implicit tenant, organization, or user access.

initialUserGrant.description: Omitted means enabled=true and accessLevel=full. Set enabled=false to create no initial grant.

providerRootRef.description: Admin-only provider root. local_filesystem values are canonicalized server-side.

organizationId.description: Owning organization resolved from the verified backend session.

providerRootRef.description: Canonical provider root visible only on the protected Drive backend-admin API. It must never appear in app/open API responses, logs, or audit payloads.

AuthorizationProblem.description: The verified principal is not authorized for sandbox administration.

NotFoundProblem.description: The tenant-scoped sandbox resource was not found.

ConflictProblem.description: The mutation conflicts with current resource state.
